descriptions.text: Quiz Show was an italian TV show aired from october 2000 to january 2002, based on the TV format "It's Your Chance of a Lifetime". The contestants have 512 seconds to anwer 10 questions, each one progressively difficult

A quiz show is a type of game show. It may also refer to:

Quiz Show (film), a 1994 film based on the 1950s quiz show scandals
Quiz Show (video game), a 1976 arcade game
"The Quiz Show", an episode of I Love Lucy
